---
title: "ICCAT Southern Atlantic Albacore Management Strategy Evaluation"
---

This site hosts the materials for the Management Strategy Evaluation (MSE)
process for South Atlantic albacore tuna (*Thunnus alalunga*), managed by the
[International Commission for the Conservation of Atlantic Tunas
(ICCAT)](https://www.iccat.int).

The MSE tests candidate management procedures against a range of plausible
operating models to evaluate their performance against management objectives
under uncertainty.

The MSE analysis uses the `iccatSALB` R package, developed for this purpose
and built on the [openMSE](https://openmse.com/) framework.

## Materials

- [Trial Specifications Document](tsd/): the operating models,
  management procedures, and performance metrics used in the MSE.


## Repository Structure

The [`iccatSALB` repository](https://github.com/Blue-Matter/iccatSALB) is
organised as follows:

| Directory / File | Purpose |
|------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| `R/` | Package functions and objects. Currently not used |
| `analysis/` | Analysis scripts that run the MSE  |
| `data-raw/` | ABC conditioning model output  |
| `objects/` | Saved R objects produced by the analysis scripts (`OM/`, `Hist/`, etc.) |
| `tsd/` | Quarto source for the Trial Specifications Document |
| `homepage/` | Quarto source for this website |

To reproduce the analysis, download the [`iccatSALB` repository](https://github.com/Blue-Matter/iccatSALB),
install and work through the scripts in `analysis`.
